passives.name: Covering Fire
passives.effects: While your ally is within {{tt|1200 units|center-to-edge}}, your basic attacks [[on-hit]] generate a stack of ''Covering Fire''. At 1 stack, your next basic attack consumes them all to cause your ally to fire a bolt at the target, dealing {{as|{{pp|50 to 100}} physical damage}} and applying your ally's on-hit effects at 100% effectiveness.

effects_structured.raw: While your ally is within {{tt 1200 units center-to-edge}}, your basic attacks [[on-hit]] generate a stack of ''Covering Fire''

At 1 stack, your next basic attack consumes them all to cause your ally to fire a bolt at the target, dealing {{as {{pp 50 to 100}} physical damage}} and applying your ally's on-hit effects at 100% effectiveness.

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Execution model: while allied-partner range criteria are met, the user builds Covering Fire on basic-attack on-hit events, then spends the stack on the next basic attack to trigger an ally-fired bolt.
Player-visible behavior: the ally-fired bolt applies ally on-hit effects at full effectiveness to the struck target.
Known edge semantics from page notes (for example ally stack/cooldown interactions on some effects) are not fully encoded and remain follow-up fidelity work.

Availability/economy note: this distributed item is Arena-scoped and acquired through distributed systems (for example anvils, augments, or round rewards) rather than standard shop purchase; Tier-1 datasets expose reconciliation economy values (total 1000 / sell 400).
